column1: Mon, 22 Oct 2001 15:46:25 -0700 (PDT),diane.goode@enron.com,andrew.edison@enron.com,Request for Freeze on E-Mail Destruction,"At Richard Sanders' request, we ask that you freeze destruction of electronic mail for the following individuals (effective immediately).  This request is made in regard to the Bid/Ask patent litigation.  We should retain their e-mail communications going back as far as possible.
We will be sending an additional list of IT persons on Tuesday.  Please let me know what else I need to do to expedite this process."
